content_body: Well, I would like to say that this has to be the best ever most relaxing place that I've ever been too. This cabin and its surrounding area is one of the most breathtaking places I've ever seen. As a first time experience I have truly enjoyed this. I'm planning on making many more trips in the future. I want to thank my family for allowing me to join them on this trip. Absolutely amazing!!! My final thanks is to you for this wonderful cabin. As well as my family members, whom also really enjoyed the experience as well. Like a breathe of fresh air. We will all be returning!!!
title: Most Relaxing Place Ever!
